thesis_bull: GLD has the highest 12-month total return in the macro basket (+38.56% vs SPY +34.44%, IEF +1.19%) per deterministic snapshot data/market/2026-05-12/0630.json, is above its 210-day MA, and is selected as the top-1 risk asset by dual_momentum_taa. Also satisfies gold_permanent_overlay (Strategy C) — the two strategies agree on the same symbol, so this single position covers both allocations.
thesis_bear: Gold at +38.56% 12m has stretched momentum and can mean-revert sharply if the dollar firms or real rates rise. News connector offline (news_unavailable) — company/macro catalysts unknown, treated as a risk factor per CLAUDE.md > Handling missing data, not as bullish silence. Latest bar date 2026-05-06 (6-day Alpaca IEX tier lag) means we are sizing on a price that may differ from the true 2026-05-12 close.
invalidation_condition: GLD closes below its 210-day MA OR is outranked by SPY/IEF on 12-month total return at the next monthly check. Hard stop also at -10% from fill price.

position_size.applied_cap: max_risk_per_trade_pct=1.5 with default_stop_loss_pct=10.0 -> position capped at 15% of account; Strategy A's 60% intent is reduced to satisfy the per-trade risk budget; Strategy C's 10% overlay subsumed by the same line item (do not double-count).

confidence_notes: Deterministic top-1 by 12m + 210d MA confirmation. Reduced from 0.75 because news connector is offline (no company/macro catalyst awareness) and data is 6 days stale.
risk_manager_notes: Per-position pct (14.64%) under macro_etf cap (60%) AND under max_position_size_pct (15%); per-trade risk = 14.64% * 10% stop = 1.46% under max_risk_per_trade_pct (1.5%); sector Commodity_Gold unique among new opens; not in earnings window (commodity ETF); R/R 2.5:1 above min 1.5; strategy dual_momentum_taa is ACTIVE_PAPER_TEST; symbol approved_for_paper_trading=true.
compliance_notes: Decision class PAPER_BUY permitted under mode PAPER_TRADING. No live order path. Bull/bear/invalidation present. Schema-compliant. Subagent dispatch within cap.

data_provenance.signal_rationale: dual_momentum_taa: ENTRY — top-1 risk asset, all filters passed
data_provenance.data_freshness_note: Alpaca free IEX tier lag; 6m/12m momentum is tolerant of T-N timestamps. Live-execution staleness rule (60s) does NOT apply because we are in PAPER_TRADING mode using daily-bar momentum signals.
